data.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s Warren Buffet – “Some people should not own stocks at all”
data.description:
Speaking to CNBC on Friday, Berkshire Hathaway Chairman Warren Buffett said that “some people should not own stocks at all,” because they get easily rattled with price fluctuations, like this week’s stock market crash. “If you’re going to do dumb things because your stock goes down, you shouldn’t own a stock at all,” the 94-year-old […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffet-some-people-shouldnt-own-stock/

data.title: Bitcoin Founder Satoshi Nakamoto's Alleged Birthdate Sparks Speculation
data.description: According to Odaily, the birthdate listed by Bitcoin founder Satoshi Nakamoto on the P2P Foundation website is April 5, 1975. If accurate, this would mark Nakamoto's 50th birthday today. However, the authenticity of this date is questionable, as it coincides with the 42nd anniversary of the U.S. government's Executive Order 6102, which prohibited private gold ownership to stabilize the dollar on April 5, 1933. Additionally, addresses associated with Nakamoto hold approximately 1.1 million BTC, which have remained unmoved since early 2010 and are now valued at over $90 billion.

data.title: According to the P2P Foundation registration information, today is Satoshi Nakamoto’s 50th birthday
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin founder Satoshi Nakamoto filled in the date of birth column on the P2P Foundation website as April 5, 1975. If the information is true, it means that today is Satoshi Nakamoto's 50th birthday. However, this date may not be true, because this day happens to be the 42nd anniversary of the US government's ban on private gold holdings to stabilize the US dollar on April 5, 1933, in accordance with Executive Order No. 6102.
In addition, Satoshi Nakamoto's related addresses hold about 1.1 million BTC, which have not been transferred since the beginning of 2010 and are now worth more than $90 billion. (beincrypto)

data.title: An address withdrew 10 million BMT from Bybit, worth $927,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the address 6U6GC...yurLj withdrew 10 million BMT from Bybit at an average price of $0.09273, worth $927,000. A month ago, he also tried to make a small profit by doing BMT band trading, and it is suspected that he intends to try for another rebound.

data.title: DWF Labs Partner: Considering Purchasing Another Token
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DWF co-founder Andrei Grachev posted on the X platform that a project contacted us, we supported and repurchased (or referred to as HIPPO), and another token is under consideration. Andrei Grachev said "Fck bears and make crypto great again! LFG!" and attached a market performance comparison chart of the Hippo project and another project (anonymous).

data.title: An early ETH investor sold another 612 ETH and currently still holds 32,788 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, "OG who ICO 100,000 ETH in 2015" sold 612 ETH (US$1.12 million) again after 2 days, with the cost as low as US$0.31. The whale has sold a total of 2,213 ETH since April, making a profit of US$4.076 million; currently, three wallet addresses still hold 32,788 ETH, worth US$59.34 million.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Farside indicates that U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a net outflow of $165 million this week.

data.title: Brazil’s top court authorises freezing of crypto assets for debt recovery
data.description:
5-4-2025 – Brazil’s Superior Court of Justice (STJ) has unanimously granted courts the power to freeze cryptocurrency holdings for debt collection purposes. The groundbreaking decision, delivered by the STJ’s Third Panel, establishes digital assets as legitimate targets for judicial intervention, despite their unofficial status as legal tender. The ruling effectively places cryptocurrencies on par [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/brazils-top-court-authorises-freezing-of-crypto-assets-for-debt-recovery/

data.title: Microsoft embraces ‘off-frontier’ AI strategy, prioritizes practicality
data.description:
Microsoft is shifting its artificial intelligence (AI) approach to focus on practical applications rather than pursuing the most advanced models.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/microsoft-embraces-off-frontier-ai-strategy/
